title: What the New Kimi K3 Model Really Means for the U.S.-China AI Race
summary: Thursday’s release of a surprisingly sophisticated new open-source AI model from Beijing-based startup Moonshot has ignited debate over whether China’s developers are erasing the gap with the dominant models from America’s AI firms.
